title: Data dictionary v1.0 + provenance graph publication
context: The released dataset must ship with a finalized data dictionary and a published provenance graph so researchers can trace every value to its source. This task publishes data dictionary v1.0 and the provenance graph. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Publish data dictionary v1.0 and a provenance graph linking every field/record to its source citation and locator.
acceptanceCriteria: Data dictionary v1.0 documents every released field with definition, allowed values, and provenance requirements.
Provenance graph links records/values to DOI/PMID + source_locator + license.
Dictionary and provenance graph reviewed and signed by a domain reviewer.
output: /output/release/data-dictionary-v1.0.md plus a published provenance graph, committed to the repo.
